item.title: Councils face 'uphill struggle' after elections delay U-turn
item.description: Thirty councils across England now have to organise local polls after the government abandoned plans to delay.

item.title: A big day for GB's men's curling team - Tuesday's guide
item.description: What's happening and who to look out for at the 2026 Winter Olympics in Milan-Cortina.

item.title: 'A sad day' - curling cheating row at Winter Games unsettles Canadians
item.description: Both men's and women's Canadian curling teams have been accused of cheating at the 2026 Winter Olympics.

item.title: The Martin Luther King protege who helped reshape America
item.description: The US civil rights activist's influence spread from the churches of the Deep South to the White House.

item.title: New nuclear talks between US and Iran begin in Geneva
item.description: The US president says he thinks Iran wants to make a deal, while Tehran believes Washington is moving to a more realistic position.
